title: Mixed Conditionals & Advanced Conditionals
topics: mixed type 2/3 · unless · providing/provided · as long as · but for
description: Smíšené podmínkové věty a pokročilé kondicionální struktury.
notes: Pure 3rd: If I had studied, I would HAVE PASSED. (past→past)
Mixed:   If I had studied, I WOULD BE a doctor. (past→present)\n
Pure 2nd: If I were rich, I WOULD BUY a yacht. (present→present)
Mixed:   If I were braver, I WOULD HAVE APPLIED. (present→past)

examples.en: If I had studied medicine, I would be a doctor now.
examples.cz: Kdybych studoval/a medicínu, byl/a bych teď doktor/ka.

examples.en: If we had invested in Bitcoin, we would be rich now.
examples.cz: Kdybychom investovali do Bitcoinu, byli bychom teď bohatí.

examples.en: If I were braver, I would have applied for that job.
examples.cz: Kdybych byl/a odvážnější, přihlásil/a bych se na tu práci.

quiz.sentence: If she ___ (study) harder, she would have a degree now.
If I ___ (be) taller, I would have become a basketball player.
I ___ (help) you yesterday if I had known you needed it.
You can stay, ___ you behave yourself. (condition)

tasks: 1. Write 3 mixed conditionals about your own life:
2. Complete these with your own ideas:
3. Write a paragraph about a turning point in your life using mixed conditionals
